title: Biometric Template
html: Stub. Encrypted digital representation of a biometric — what gets actually stored, instead of the raw image. Two purposes: (1) raw characteristic can't be reconstructed from template (privacy), (2) only the designated app can decrypt it. First mentioned in 2025 04 27 biometrics privacy security summary.
